prompt:
Write Python: a `Singleton` metaclass that ensures any class using it as metaclass can only have one instance. Calling the class again returns the same instance.

```python
class DB(metaclass=Singleton):
    def __init__(self, url):
        self.url = url

a = DB('postgres://localhost')
b = DB('postgres://localhost')
assert a is b
```

tests.code:
class B(metaclass=Singleton):
    def __init__(self, v):
        self.v = v
b1 = B(1)
b2 = B(2)
assert b1 is b2
assert b1.v == 1
